news.title: U.S. job creation cools in June with payrolls growth of just 57,000; unemployment rate at 4.2%
news.summary: Nonfarm payrolls are expected to rise by 115,000 in June. The unemployment rate is expected to hold steady at 4.3%.

news.title: Microsoft commits $2.5 billion and 6,000 employees to new AI implementation unit
news.summary: Microsoft is the latest tech company to form a business focused on helping customers understand and implement artificial intelligence. Microsoft's new business is called Microsoft Artificial Intelligence Services.

news.title: Tesla stock sinks 6% despite strong deliveries report
news.summary: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales. The declines were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.

news.title: Autonomous drone startup Quantum Systems raises $1.2 billion as investors pile into defense
news.summary: Defense tech startups are raising record amounts on both sides of the Atlantic. There has been a flurry of investment in the sector. There have been a number of high-profile cases of defense tech startups failing.

news.title: Led by Buc-ee’s and new rival Dolly Parton, America’s gas station chains are in a mega-sizing era
news.summary: Dolly Parton is getting in on the retail trend. Gas station chains led by Buc-ee's are coming closer to rivaling America's big box stores.

news.title: My doctor friend objected to his hospital’s fundraising tactics. Did management go too far?
news.summary: “This shocking program was exploiting doctors and the trust inherent in their relationships with patients,” he said. “This was exploiting the trust that doctors have with their patients.”

news.title: How you as an investor can get ahead of the next AI investment wave
news.summary: Also in Weekend Reads: Eldercare and family relationships, stock-market prospects for the second half of 2026, and how to set your summer streaming budget.

news.title: Where can I invest my kid’s ‘Trump account’ money? The Treasury Department just answered that question.
news.summary: Parents and investors are learning which funds they can actually use. The money in ‘Trump accounts’ has to be invested in low-cost index funds.

news.title: Why a founder at age 50 is twice as likely to find success as one at age 30
news.summary: Older workers are fighting ageism by starting their own businesses. They’re outperforming younger entrepreneurs, according to a new study.

news.title: I have no kids. Will I cause family drama by leaving different amounts to my nieces and nephews?
news.summary: “Part of me would prefer to leave more to those for whom the money could make a meaningful difference,” he says.
